untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental data (5-year growth rate, quarterly earnings growth, relative strength rank vs peers) which are not available in the allowed technical indicator set. Only technical approximations (price below 50-day MA, proximity to 52-week low via Donchian channels, RSI for relative strength) could be translated.
translation_notes: Translated deteriorating fundamentals using available technical indicators: (1) Price below 50-day MA represents broken uptrend; (2) Donchian upper band approximates 52-week highs and new lows proximity; (3) RSI < 40 approximates loss of relative strength. Fundamental conditions (growth rate, earnings deceleration, peer relative strength rank) cannot be expressed with technical indicators alone and require external data integration.
